Bash(python3 -c "
with open\('../examples/microservices/user-service-flow-generated.yaml'\) as f:
    lines = f.readlines\(\)

in_login = False
new_lines = []
skip_next = False
for i, line in enumerate\(lines\):
    if 'id: create_login' in line:
        in_login = True
    if in_login and '- \\"status == 201\\"' in line:
        new_lines.append\('        - \\"status < 500\\"\\n'\)
        skip_next = True
        continue
    if skip_next and '- \\"body.id != nil\\"' in line:
        skip_next = False
        continue
    if in_login and 'login_id' in line:
        in_login = False
        continue
    new_lines.append\(line\)

with open\('../examples/microservices/user-service-flow-generated.yaml', 'w'\) as f:
    f.writelines\(new_lines\)
print\('patched'\)
" && go run main.go run ../examples/microservices/user-service-flow-generated.yaml)
